name: raijinlabs-mcp
long_description:
LucidLayer API: LucidLayer Offchain API.

This OpenAPI spec is used to generate SDK clients.

tools.name: lucid_create_passport
tools.description: Create a new passport (model/compute/tool/dataset/agent).

tools.name: lucid_list_passports
tools.description: List passports with filtering, sorting, and pagination.

tools.name: lucid_get_passport
tools.description: Retrieve a passport by its passport_id.

tools.name: lucid_update_passport
tools.description: Update an existing passport by passport_id.

tools.name: lucid_delete_passport
tools.description: Soft-delete a passport by passport_id.

tools.name: lucid_trigger_passport_sync
tools.description: Trigger on-chain sync for a passport.

tools.name: lucid_list_passports_pending_sync
tools.description: List passports that are pending on-chain sync.

tools.name: lucid_get_passport_stats
tools.description: Get passport statistics.

tools.name: lucid_search_models
tools.description: Search model passports (ModelMeta filters).

tools.name: lucid_search_compute
tools.description: Search compute passports (ComputeMeta filters).

tools.name: lucid_match_explain
tools.description: Evaluate a policy against compute & model metadata and explain the decision.

tools.name: lucid_match
tools.description: Match compute for a model given a compute catalog and policy constraints.

tools.name: lucid_route
tools.description: Match + resolve an executable inference endpoint for a model.

tools.name: lucid_run_inference
tools.description:
Run inference through LucidLayer.
NOTE: streaming responses may not be supported by all MCP clients.

tools.name: lucid_chat_completions
tools.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions routed through LucidLayer.

tools.name: lucid_heartbeat
tools.description: Submit a compute node heartbeat to update live state.

tools.name: lucid_get_health
tools.description: Get the current health state of a compute node.

tools.name: lucid_create_receipt
tools.description: Create a receipt and append it to the receipt MMR.

tools.name: lucid_get_receipt
tools.description: Retrieve a receipt by receipt_id.

tools.name: lucid_verify_receipt
tools.description: Verify a receipt (hash + signature + inclusion proof).

tools.name: lucid_get_receipt_proof
tools.description: Get the inclusion proof for a receipt.

tools.name: lucid_get_mmr_root
tools.description: Get the current MMR root and leaf count.

tools.name: lucid_get_signer_pubkey
tools.description: Get the orchestrator signing public key.

tools.name: lucid_get_current_epoch
tools.description: Get the current epoch.

tools.name: lucid_list_epochs
tools.description: List epochs.

tools.name: lucid_create_epoch
tools.description: Create a new epoch.

tools.name: lucid_get_epoch
tools.description: Get an epoch by epoch_id.

tools.name: lucid_retry_epoch
tools.description: Retry a failed epoch.

tools.name: lucid_verify_epoch
tools.description: Verify an epoch anchor.

tools.name: lucid_get_epoch_transaction
tools.description: Get epoch anchoring transaction.

tools.name: lucid_commit_epoch_root
tools.description: Commit an epoch root to chain.

tools.name: lucid_commit_epoch_roots_batch
tools.description: Commit multiple epoch roots.

tools.name: lucid_get_anchoring_health
tools.description: Health check for anchoring service.

tools.name: lucid_list_epochs_ready
tools.description: List epochs ready for finalization.

tools.name: lucid_get_epoch_stats
tools.description: Get epoch statistics.

tools.name: lucid_calculate_payout
tools.description: Calculate payout split between recipients.

tools.name: lucid_payout_from_receipt
tools.description: Create payout split from receipt token data.

tools.name: lucid_get_payout
tools.description: Get payout for a run_id.

tools.name: lucid_verify_payout
tools.description: Verify payout split integrity.

tools.name: lucid_list_tools
tools.description: List active tool passports with optional filtering.

tools.name: lucid_list_datasets
tools.description: List active dataset passports with optional filtering.

tools.name: lucid_list_agent_passports
tools.description: List active agent passports with optional filtering.

tools.name: lucid_verify_receipt_by_hash
tools.description: Verify a receipt by its hash. Returns inclusion proof and on-chain anchoring status.

tools.name: check_system_health
tools.description: Check overall system health including all dependencies.

tools.name: check_liveness
tools.description: Liveness probe - is the application alive?

tools.name: check_readiness
tools.description: Readiness probe - is the application ready to serve traffic?

tools.name: check_database_health
tools.description: Check database connectivity and latency.

tools.name: check_redis_health
tools.description: Check Redis connectivity and latency.

tools.name: check_nango_health
tools.description: Check Nango service connectivity and latency.

tools.name: get_detailed_health
tools.description: Detailed health check including system resources and statistics.

tools.name: init_agent
tools.description: Initialize or load an AI agent for MMR-based proof-of-contribution.

tools.name: process_agent_epoch
tools.description: Process an epoch of vectors for an AI agent.

tools.name: process_agent_batch_epochs
tools.description: Process multiple epochs in batch for one or more agents.

tools.name: generate_agent_proof
tools.description: Generate cryptographic proof of contribution for a specific vector.

tools.name: get_agent_stats
tools.description: Get statistics and current status for an AI agent.

tools.name: get_agent_history
tools.description: Get an agent's MMR root history across epochs.

tools.name: get_agent_root
tools.description: Get the current MMR root for an AI agent.

tools.name: verify_agent_mmr
tools.description: Verify MMR integrity for an AI agent.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List all registered AI agents with their stats.

tools.name: plan_agent_workflow
tools.description: Plan a workflow from a natural language goal using CrewAI.

tools.name: accomplish_agent_goal
tools.description: Plan and execute a workflow in one call via the Agent Orchestrator.

tools.name: preview_agent_workflow
tools.description: Preview a planned workflow (dry run) without executing.

tools.name: get_agent_orchestrator_history
tools.description: Get agent execution history for a specific tenant.

tools.name: check_agent_orchestrator_health
tools.description: Check health of all agent orchestrator services.

tools.name: execute_agent_flowspec
tools.description: Execute a FlowSpec with automatic executor selection.

tools.name: validate_flowspec
tools.description: Validate a FlowSpec structure without executing.

tools.name: get_planner_info
tools.description: Get agent planner service information and status.

tools.name: check_executor_health
tools.description: Check health of executor backends (n8n, LangGraph).

tools.name: get_executor_decision
tools.description: Get recommended executor for a FlowSpec without executing.
